labor_force.name: Civilian Labor Force - 16 years and over

county._note: Populated by scripts/generate_county_series.py — do not edit manually. Run: python scripts/generate_county_series.py [--state <name|abbrev|fips>]

county.example: LAUCN060370000000003 = Los Angeles County Unemployment Rate
county.county_fips: 5-digit county FIPS code (state FIPS + 3-digit county code)

notes.state_county_data: State and county series are NOT seasonally adjusted
notes.fips_format: County FIPS = State FIPS (2 digits) + County code (3 digits)
